description_long: This bungalow is a modern residential building set within a fenced lot, featuring a combination of flat and gabled roof sections. The front facade includes a driveway leading to a carport, manicured hedges, and a prominent entryway. Large floor-to-ceiling windows are visible on one side, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard boasts a spacious swimming pool surrounded by palm trees, a shaded lounge area with outdoor furniture, and a small pool house or cabana. The property is landscaped with green lawns and paved walkways, and the overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces with a blend of indoor and outdoor living. The structure is primarily constructed from concrete, glass, and metal, with modern architectural lines and a sleek aesthetic.
description: A modern bungalow with a mix of flat and gabled roofs, large glass windows, a driveway, and a backyard pool with palm trees and lounge areas. The design features open spaces, contemporary materials, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, manicured hedges, and a glimpse of the backyard pool area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large glass windows, flat-roofed section, and the pool area with lounge chairs and palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the swimming pool, shaded lounge area, palm trees, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool house/cabana, side entrance, and the transition between the gabled and flat roof sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows on one side
